events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon, killing medics
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon have resulted in the deaths of two medics. This incident is part of ongoing hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah, despite a previously announced ceasefire.

events.title: Medics among 51 killed in Israeli attacks on Lebanon
events.desc: Israeli attacks in southern Lebanon have intensified, leading to the deaths of 51 individuals, including medics, within a 24-hour period. This marks a significant escalation in casualties since a ceasefire was announced.

events.title: Israeli weapon using tungsten cubes causes internal injuries in Lebanon
events.desc: Reports indicate that Israeli weapons deployed in Lebanon are utilizing tiny tungsten cubes, causing severe internal injuries similar to those observed in Gaza. This raises concerns about the nature of munitions used in the conflict.

events.title: Two waves of bombing detailed at Iran school strike
events.desc: New videos geolocated and verified by Bellingcat reveal details of two distinct bombing waves that struck an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. The videos show multiple missiles hitting the complex.

events.title: Trump rejects Iran's response to peace proposal
events.desc: U.S. President Donald Trump has rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal aimed at ending the conflict, deeming it 'totally unacceptable.' This rejection raises concerns that the conflict may continue.

events.title: Israel deports activists from Gaza-bound flotilla
events.desc: Israel has deported two foreign activists who were seized from a Gaza-bound flotilla. The activists' representatives have described the seizure as a 'punitive attack' on a civilian mission.

events.title: Iran war live: Trump slams Tehran’s reply; Israel kills 2 medics in Lebanon
events.desc: US President Trump has criticized Iran's reply to a peace proposal as 'unacceptable'. Simultaneously, Israeli forces have killed two medics in Lebanon, indicating continued kinetic activity in the region.

events.title: Iran sends response to US proposal for ending war
events.desc: Iran has officially submitted its response to a U.S. proposal aimed at concluding the ongoing conflict. Pakistan has acted as the mediator in this exchange, with Iran stating the current negotiations will focus on a cessation of hostilities.

events.title: Middle East conflicts increase danger for whales off South Africa
events.desc: Researchers report that Middle East conflicts are posing increased risks to whales off the coast of South Africa. The rerouting of shipping traffic due to regional instability is leading to a higher likelihood of collisions with whales in their habitats.

events.title: Netanyahu: Iran war not over, uranium must be removed
events.desc: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that the war with Iran is not concluded until its enriched uranium stockpile is removed and enrichment sites are dismantled. He emphasized the need for direct action to achieve this.

events.title: UK, France to host defence ministers meeting on Hormuz
events.desc: The UK and France will convene a multinational meeting of defence ministers to discuss military strategies for restoring trade flow through the Strait of Hormuz. This comes after Iran issued a warning against sending warships to the region.

events.title: Trump and China's Xi to discuss Iran, nuclear, trade, AI
events.desc: U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping are scheduled to hold discussions covering critical issues including Iran, nuclear weapons, trade, and artificial intelligence. The talks aim to stabilize bilateral relations strained by various disagreements.

events.title: Iran Nobel winner Narges Mohammadi released on bail for medical treatment
events.desc: Iranian authorities have released Nobel Peace Prize winner Narges Mohammadi on bail due to concerns over her health. She has been transferred to Tehran for medical treatment, with her foundation confirming the sentence suspension.

events.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
events.desc: Lebanon reports that Israeli strikes have resulted in the deaths of 39 individuals. This occurs amidst ongoing exchanges of fire between Israel and Hezbollah, despite a recent ceasefire announcement.

events.title: BBC traces devastation from Israeli bombing in Lebanon
events.desc: A BBC investigation details the destruction caused by Israeli bombing in Lebanon, focusing on a 10-minute period that resulted in widespread chaos and devastation across the country.
